HP Unix OS; still maintained but declining; HPE announced last release 2025
Aberdeen predicted high probability of becoming open-systems industry standard; adopted by EMC, DG/CLARiiON and 50+ others
16 ports at 266 Mbit/s; hub architecture; target 32 ports at 1 Gbit/s by 3Q97

Working with HP MC/LockManager for high OLTP performance on EPS; replaced by Oracle RAC
